mapper.insert: insert into dataportal.dh_meta_schema (project_id, schema_id, dh_dscr, ww_dscr, datahub_layer, dh_env, timezone, use_yn, del_yn, dh_rgst_dt, dh_modi_dt, rgst_id, rgst_dt, modi_id, modi_dt) values (#{projectId}, #{schemaId}, #{dhDscr}, #{wwDscr}, #{datahubLayer}, #{dhEnv}, #{timezone}, #{useYn}, #{delYn}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{rgstId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{modiId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
